summary: Block 6 (Ghostwriter) tested end-to-end. Backend POST /api/ghostwriter/generate works with real Gemini API for both 'flash' (gemini-flash-lite-latest) and 'pro' (gemini-2.5-flash) models, validates required fields, requires auth. Frontend page /ghostwriter renders, form interaction works, validation toast shows for <10 char context, generation produces real content (~1.4k chars in ~5s), save/copy/clear/persistence (localStorage) all functional. Regression smoke on dashboard/pipeline/projects/expenses/services/simulator passed. 5/5 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend ~95% (one missing testid).

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='nav-ghostwriter' is missing on the sidebar link. The link is visible and clickable (label 'Ghostwriter') and routes correctly to /ghostwriter, but the requested testid is absent. Other sidebar items likely also need a consistent nav-* testid scheme.

issues: Pre-existing recharts console warnings: 'Received NaN for the children attribute' (already reported in iteration_1, not Block 6 related)

action_items: Add data-testid='nav-ghostwriter' (and ideally nav-dashboard, nav-pipeline, nav-projects, nav-expenses, nav-services, nav-simulator) to the corresponding NavLink components in /app/frontend/src/features/Layout.jsx for stable test selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: ghostwriter.js: MODEL_MAP labels 'pro' to 'gemini-2.5-flash' which is technically a Flash variant, not a Pro model. The user's plan does not unlock real Pro models (per problem statement), so this is intentional, but consider renaming the UI label or adding a tooltip that 'Pro' currently maps to gemini-2.5-flash to avoid user confusion.
Retry/backoff loop is implemented inline; works fine but if more LLM endpoints are added consider extracting into a shared helper (DRY).
Frontend GhostwriterPage.jsx (~590 lines) is approaching the 700-line limit; if more sections are added, consider extracting AssetsLibrary and GeneratorForm into sub-components.
ASSETS in localStorage capped at 50 items - good. No size cap per asset; very long results could bloat storage but not blocking.
test_credentials: admin@mikon.com / admin123 (login OK). Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md does not exist - may want to create it.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing admin user. localStorage assets created during test were cleared via the Vaciar flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ghostwriter.py covers health, auth, validation and real Gemini calls (flash + pro). Real Gemini calls take ~5s each and may flake with 503 (test handles via skip). Frontend ghostwriter flow proven working end-to-end including localStorage persistence after reload. Only fix needed: add nav-* data-testid attributes to sidebar NavLinks in Layout.jsx.
rca of the issue: Missing nav-ghostwriter testid: the Layout.jsx sidebar NavLink for Ghostwriter was added without the requested data-testid attribute. Easy 1-line fix in Layout.jsx by adding data-testid='nav-ghostwriter' to the corresponding NavLink/anchor element.
